word: G2961 - κυριεύω - kyrieúō - ko-ree-yoo'-o - Have dominion over

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κυριεύω

- Transliteration: Kurieuo

- Phonetic: ko-ree-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to be lord of, to rule, have dominion over

2. of things and forces

a. to exercise influence upon, to have power over

- Origin: from G2962

- TDNT entry: 21:17,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2962; to rule: - have dominion over lord be Lord of exercise Lordship over.
